keepInSitemap_doNotExclude.note: These read as thin ONLY because entry-content extraction under-reads Elementor builds. Body-text spot-checks confirm real content. Do NOT exclude.
examples: /blog/ (thin index — fix via F-17 category hubs, not exclusion)
